text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Just a little longer now... Hehe,<n>waiting for the curtain to rise
is so<n>exciting, isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Earlier that day...

Thank you for seeing me off. I'll be<n>sure to call you when
I'm on my way<n>home.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer, good day to you. I didn't<n>expect to see you here.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I'm headed to the theater. One of<n>our family's
sponsors sent us a<n>couple of tickets for a play.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
My sister was supposed to join me,<n>but she unfortunately
has a race<n>today, so I'm going alon—ah!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I understand that this is very sudden,<n>but would you like to
join me?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I'm so glad we could see this play<n>together, Trainer. It's a
very popular<n>piece—one that I've been meaning to<n>see for
some time now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
It's the story of two knights who<n>decide to seek fame and
fortune by<n>expelling a ghost from a haunted<n>castle. It's a
comedy.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I've heard it's based on a classic,<n>but according to reviews,
it has its<n>own merits as a piece of<n>contemporary—oh, it's
starting.

text_block_list.name: Knight A
text_block_list.text:
My friend, do my eyes deceive me?<n>Is that not the accursed
castle, said to<n>only appear at dusk? What a<n>foreboding
atmosphere...

text_block_list.name: Knight B
text_block_list.text:
Do not let the tales of ghosts and<n>ghouls frighten you,
comrade! O Lady<n>Luck, grant us your boon on this hunt,<n>so
that we may at last obtain glory!

text_block_list.name: Knights
text_block_list.text:
A g-g-g-g-ghost?!Oh, it was just you...<n>Hey, quit copying me!
Arrrghh!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Oh dear! Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
True to the play's reputation, the<n>theater periodically fills
with laughter.<n>But the most memorable part of the<n>play for
me is watching Ardan's<n>reactions.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
It seems the reviews were spot-on. It<n>certainly was
entertaining to watch<n>those two jump at every single<n>
sound, wasn't it?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
However... I am a little sad a ghost<n>never actually appeared.
If it were me,<n>I would return to that castle every<n>night until
I finally saw one.
choice_data_list: You want to meet the ghost that badly?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Doesn't teatime with a ghost sound<n>delightful? I'm sure
they'd have<n>plenty of stories about the castle's<n>history...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
And... Allowing someone forgotten to<n>shine again for just a
moment feels<n>like a resurrection of sorts, doesn't<n>it?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Sigh... What a pleasant breeze.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, would you like to take a walk<n>with me? The sunset
is so beautiful,<n>after all. It almost feels like—
choice_data_list: Like we'll stumble upon that castle?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Hehe... wouldn't that be a splendid<n>surprise.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
As a child, I would often imagine<n>myself as one of the
characters in the<n>play I had just seen.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I could be anything—a young man or<n>even an old woman.
Sometimes I'd go<n>on an adventure, while other times<n>I'd
do something bad and get scolded<n>for it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
We only live once, but through the<n>power of imagination, I
felt like I was<n>able to step into the life of another for<n>a brief
moment. It was like a secret<n>game.
choice_data_list:
So are you imagining yourself as a knight right
now?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I'm not so sure about that. Perhaps<n>I'm a curious ghost,
simply observing<n>the two bumbling intruders who claim<n>to
be there to hunt me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Good point... If the knights had<n>actually found the ghost,
would it have<n>wanted to talk to them?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
If it were me, I'd certainly want to<n>know what sort of people
the knights<n>were.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: For example, what sort of games didthey play as children?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Oh dear! Hehe, you must have been<n>quite the adorable child,
Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I'd love to hear more. Tell me, what<n>else did you play as a
child?
choice_data_list: Well, at this time of year...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Huh? Ah...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
P-pardon me. Goodness... My<n>stomach doesn't usually
growl like<n>that.
choice_data_list:
We've been walking for a while, so it makes
sense.

We've been walking for a while, so it makes
sense.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Oh really? I hadn't noticed. Your<n>stories were just so
interesting.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
We certainly have walked a lot<n>though... I usually avoid
taking such<n>long walks. Otherwise people worry<n>about my
health.
choice_data_list:
Well, that's in the past. You can handle it now,
right?

Well, that's in the past. You can handle it now,
right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Ah...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
In addition, I was wondering...<n>Perhaps we could use
today's<n>increased practice regimen going<n>forward?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: I was just about to ask.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Oh my! Ehehe, I should be grateful.<n>As I am now, I don't
have to worry<n>about overheating anymore.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: (That's right. Trainer always believes<n>in my abilities...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: (How strange... My chest feels so<n>warm... Trainer is so...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Ah... No, I'm fine. I was just reflecting<n>on how much fun
I've had today.
